description: PostgreSQL :: cast syntax works alongside CAST() — confirms type resolution for double-colon casts
name: cast_pg_double_colon
query_sql:
-- @name ListUsersWithCasts
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, id::bigint AS big_id, name::varchar(10) AS short_name FROM users
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active');
